caption: The video appears to be captured by a security camera, labeled as "Cam 04," and shows a nighttime scene outside a building with a corrugated metal roof. The timestamp indicates it is 11:35 PM on May 13, 2022. In the background, there is a parked car partially visible under the roof, along with some outdoor furniture, including a ladder and what looks like a table or bench. The area is dimly lit, primarily by a bright light source on the right side of the frame, which casts shadows and illuminates part of the scene. There is no significant movement or activity observed in the frames provided, suggesting a quiet and still environment. The overall setting seems to be a residential or possibly a small commercial space, given the presence of the car and outdoor items.
